parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ method: 'Authenticate', params: { database: $env.GEOTAB_DATABASE, userName: $env.GEOTAB_USERNAME, password: $env.GEOTAB_PASSWORD } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ method: 'Get', params: { typeName: 'Trip', search: { fromDate: new Date(Date.now() - 7*24*60*60*1000).toISOString(), toDate: new Date().toISOString() }, credentials: $json.result.credentials } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: '📊 GreenFleet Weekly Sustainability Digest' }}, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Week of ${new Date().toLocaleDateString()}*

🚗 *${$json.trips}* trips completed
📏 *${$json.distKm.toLocaleString()}* km driven
⛽ *${$json.estFuelL.toLocaleString()}* L fuel (estimated)
🌍 *${$json.estCO2Tonnes}* tonnes CO2
⏱️ *${$json.idlePct}%* idle time ratio

💡 _Reduce idle time to cut emissions. Consider EV conversion for short-route vehicles._` }}] }) }}
